data.content: Approved plan. Alias threading from KnotRecord through Beat, WaveBeat, BeatDependency, and CascadeDescendant is coherent; the waves route dep.type filter fix is required; and RelationshipPicker selectedItems plus readOnly solves the missing delete-path issue safely. No invariants were present. Implementation note: the lightbox does not currently hydrate persisted dependencies into local state, so read-only selected items should be derived from fetched deps plus staged additions.
